packageDirectories.versionDescription: Giant Query PDF: render 3K-50K+ child records as formatted PDF entirely server-side. Pre-baked HTML templates, progressive Queueable assembly, column formatting, parent lookup fields. Plus all v1.2.0 features: DOCX/PDF/PPTX/XLSX generation, visual query builder, bulk generation, Flow actions, barcodes, QR codes, and zero-heap PDF rendering.
